data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity badge in the kitchen-sink runner UI for informational demo events. Short noun; sentence case. Distinct from foundation severity.info so the cascade test can verify per-package bundle resolution.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity badge in the kitchen-sink runner UI for warning-level demo events. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity badge in the kitchen-sink runner UI for error-level demo events. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity badge in the kitchen-sink runner UI for critical demo events. Short noun; sentence case; pairs with high-attention styling.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Progress label on the kitchen-sink settings-panel save button while persistence is in flight. Includes trailing horizontal ellipsis (U+2026) — translators preserve the ellipsis convention even when their language uses different terminal punctuation.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Dismiss/abort label on the kitchen-sink settings-panel cancel button. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Retry label on the kitchen-sink runner after a demo step fails. Imperative; sentence case; appears next to severity badges.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Empty-state placeholder shown while a kitchen-sink demo page is fetching its initial data. Includes trailing horizontal ellipsis (U+2026).
